recommendations.title: My Little Pony: Equestria Girls
recommendations.overview: Via a magic mirror, Twilight Sparkle travels into an alternate universe in order to recover a crown that was stolen from the Crystal Empire. Upon her arrival she is horrified to learn that she has turned into a human.

recommendations.title: My Little Pony: Equestria Girls – Rainbow Rocks
recommendations.overview: Music rules and rainbows rock as Twilight Sparkle and pals compete for the top spot in the Canterlot High "Mane Event" talent show. The girls must rock their way to the top, and outshine rival Adagio Dazzle and her band The Dazzlings, to restore harm

recommendations.title: My Little Pony: Equestria Girls - Friendship Games
recommendations.overview: Canterlot High meets its rival school, Crystal Prep Academy, in a competition that’s a long-standing tradition – The Friendship Games. Sunset Shimmer is tasked with keeping magic out of the games to avoid the appearance of impropriety while she and h

recommendations.title: The Snowman
recommendations.overview: A young boy makes a snowman one Christmas Eve, which comes to life at midnight and takes him on a magical adventure to the North Pole to meet Santa Claus.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: The Innocents

recommendations.title: KPop Demon Hunters
recommendations.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

recommendations.title: Mary Poppins
recommendations.overview: In turn of the century London, a magical nanny employs music and adventure to help two neglected children become closer to their father.

recommendations.title: The Maker
recommendations.overview: A strange creature races against time to make the most important and beautiful creation of his life.
